occupation_definition: Instruct preschool-aged students, following curricula or lesson plans, in activities designed to promote social, physical, and intellectual growth. Excludes “Special Education Teachers” (25-2050), “Substitute Teachers, Short-Term” (25-3031), and “Childcare Workers” (39-9011).

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Preschool, Elementary, Middle, Secondary, and Special Education Teachers
